refnamediv.refpurpose: Measure connected regions in a label image.

listitem.para: Structure array of region measurements such as area, centroid, and bounding box.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imregionprops returns a Scilab list of structures with Area, Centroid, BoundingBox, Perimeter, Extent, and PixelIdxList fields. Coordinates are [x y] with y increasing downward.

refsection.title: Examples
